name: QRadar-0010 - Cryptocurrency Mining Activity Detection
description: Detects unauthorized cryptocurrency mining (cryptojacking) by identifying network connections to known mining pool ports. Cryptomining malware consumes resources and often indicates a broader compromise.

detection.log_source_type: Network Flows (QFlow), DNS Logs, Proxy Logs, Firewall
detection.aql: SELECT sourceIP, destinationIP, destinationPort, COUNT(*) as connection_count, SUM(bytesTotal) as total_bytes FROM flows WHERE destinationPort IN (3333, 4444, 5555, 7777, 8888, 9999, 14444, 14433, 45700) GROUP BY sourceIP, destinationIP, destinationPort HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 LAST 30 MINUTES

response.offense_description: A host is communicating with known cryptocurrency mining pool ports. Indicates unauthorized cryptojacking, which often follows a system compromise.
response.recommended_action: Isolate affected host, perform full malware scan, investigate initial access vector

notes: Inspired by SIGMA rule: net_crypto_mining_pool_connection. Simplified — uses port-based detection only. Mining pool ports list should be updated regularly.
author: Security Team
